name: liburi-perl
title: liburi-perl
summary: module to manipulate and access URI strings
description:
module to manipulate and access URI strings
URI is a collection of Perl modules that represent and manipulate Uniform
Resource Identifier (URI) references as specified in RFC 2396.
.
URI objects can be used to access and manipulate the various components
that make up these strings.  There are also methods to combine URIs in
various ways.
.
The URI class replaces the URI::URL class that used to be distributed with
libwww-perl. This package also includes an emulation of the old URI::URL
interface, which implements both the old and the new interface.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use liburi-perl because module to manipulate and access URI strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use liburi-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair liburi-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `liburi-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
